feed.title: eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server
feed.subtitle: Premium 5G eSIM connectivity with ultra-fast entertainment streaming across Myanmar and ASEAN
feed.rights: Copyright 2025 eSIM Myanmar Company Limited. All Rights Reserved.

entry.title: eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server Launch
entry.summary: Premium 5G eSIM connectivity launches across Myanmar and ASEAN with Microsoft technology stack serving 50 million users
entry.content:
eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server Now Live

We are excited to announce the launch of eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server, offering premium 5G eSIM connectivity with ultra-fast entertainment streaming across Myanmar and ASEAN.

Microsoft Technology Stack

  • Azure Static Web Apps with global CDN
  • Azure Functions 5 with Durable Functions 4
  • Microsoft Graph Toolkit 4.5.0
  • Fluent UI React 10 with Acrylic and Mica Alt
  • Power Pages Pro for enterprise integration

Premium Features

  • Ultra-Fast 5G connectivity up to 10Gbps
  • 4K HDR streaming with Dolby Atmos audio
  • Enterprise security with Microsoft Zero Trust
  • ASEAN-wide coverage across 10 countries
  • Instant QR code activation
  • Multi-device support

entry.title: Bilingual Support with Myanmar Unicode
entry.summary: Complete bilingual support with native Myanmar Unicode rendering and Azure AI Translator integration
entry.content:
Native Myanmar Language Support

eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server now offers complete bilingual support with native Myanmar Unicode rendering using Leelawadee UI font family.

မြန်မာနိုင်ငံနှင့် အာဆီယံတစ်ဝှမ်းတွင် ပရီမီယံ 5G eSIM ချိတ်ဆက်မှုဖြင့် အရည်အသွေးမြင့် ဖျော်ဖြေရေးဝန်ဆောင်မှု

Features

  • Real-time language switching
  • Azure AI Translator integration
  • Cultural context awareness
  • Cross-browser compatibility

entry.title: API Documentation and Developer Resources
entry.summary: Comprehensive API documentation for developers integrating with eSIM Myanmar services
entry.content:
Developer API Documentation

Complete API documentation is now available for developers looking to integrate with eSIM Myanmar Entertainment Server services.

Available APIs

  • Coverage API - 5G network coverage maps
  • Speed Test API - Network performance testing
  • Activation API - eSIM profile activation
  • Device API - Compatible device listings
  • News API - Latest updates and announcements
